advancedVocab.truyề thuyết: legend; myth (note: should be 'truyền thuyết', possible typo)
advancedVocab.nuốt chừng: swallow whole (idiomatic: to consume entirely, not just eating)
advancedVocab.người tahiti: Tahitians (culturally specific: refers to people from Tahiti)
advancedVocab.theo như: according to (discourse marker: introduces reported information)

vocab.chém đôi: cut in half; slash in two

advancedVocab.fan: fan (borrowed from English, refers to enthusiast/supporter)

advancedVocab.hẳn: surely; certainly (nuanced: strong assertion, often softens or emphasizes a statement)

beginnerVocab.con: animal; creature (note: also classifier for animals)

advancedVocab.lộ liễu: blatant; obvious (often with a negative connotation)
advancedVocab.tier đầu: first tier; top level (note: 'tier' is an English loanword used in Vietnamese pop culture)

advancedVocab.khó nhằn: tough; tricky; hard to deal with (colloquial, nuanced)
advancedVocab.Dĩ nhiên thì: of course; naturally (discourse marker, adds emphasis)

advancedVocab.tier: tier (loanword, may refer to ranking/classification system)

advancedVocab.ngày càng: increasingly; more and more (note: idiomatic expression for gradual increase)

vocab.trong việc: in the act of; in (doing something)

advancedVocab.V sao: stars (abbreviation for 'vì sao', meaning 'stars'; may be confusing due to capitalization or context)

advancedVocab.hay hay: kind of interesting; amusing (note: reduplication for emphasis, not just 'good')
